jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Rapido
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
